In addition, the wearer can allow a willing creature to inspect the ring as a full-round action. If she does, for the following 3 rounds the creature and the wearer can speak while the ringâs power obfuscates the details of the conversation. To every other creature able to hear the creature and the wearerâs words during this time, the conversation sounds like a continued back-and-forth exchange of exaltations about the ringâs artistry.
